mapper.select: SELECT * FROM article WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY view_count DESC, like_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM article WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY published_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT YEAR(published_at) as year, MONTH(published_at) as month, COUNT(*) as postCount FROM article WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND published_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY YEAR(published_at), MONTH(published_at) ORDER BY year DESC, month DESC

SELECT YEAR(published_at) as year, MONTH(published_at) as month, COUNT(*) as postCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as publishedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as draftCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as privateCount FROM article WHERE deleted = 0 AND published_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY YEAR(published_at), MONTH(published_at) ORDER BY year DESC, month DESC
